subject: Finnick from Disney's Zootopia in his bunny disguise — a small fennec fox in a bunny costume with pink bow, running with wide eyes
description: A small fennec fox wears a bunny rabbit costume — fluffy grey suit, large fake bunny ears with a pink bow on top. The figure runs forward at low angle, a pacifier (or similar small object) in its mouth, eyes wide and slightly manic. Two additional small animal figures are visible in the background, appearing startled or fleeing. The setting appears to be a bright green urban or city environment. The costume-within-character visual creates an immediate comedic and slightly threatening impression — the 'tiny terror' of the subtitle reading clearly in the posture.
foreground: Small fennec fox in grey bunny costume with pink bow, running forward with wide eyes
background: Bright green urban environment, two small animal figures fleeing in background
emotion: manic wide-eyed running, simultaneously cute and threatening
